title: sesamum zanguebarium
intro: Sesamum zanguebarium, also known as white sesame or benne, is a flowering plant species in the sesame family, characterized by its white flowers and seed pods. The seeds of this plant have been used for centuries for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sesamum zanguebarium seeds include their ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and support bone health. Sesamum zanguebarium seeds are often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, oils, and powders, to take advantage of their medicinal and nutritional benefits.
